cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a nail salon for weekday office-friendly short nails using real-work proof and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: short nail styles, optional removal, no exaggerated same-as-reference promise
input.audience_segment: local office workers who want understated but polished nails

mustInclude: scene-based opening around office or daily wear
CTA that collects style direction and booking time

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a wedding-season nail booking route
input.offer_info: bridal and event nails, booking-first, style-match emphasis
input.audience_segment: users preparing for weddings, photoshoots, and major events

input.strategy_route: Write a soft rebooking message for regular nail clients approaching their next cycle

cases.label: risk_case

truthful mention of add-ons where relevant
